judge_result.short_rationale: Includes correct removal to fresh air, but omits the required instruction to keep the person resting. Adds unsupported cross-incident advice to wash exposed skin and an ingestion-specific 'do not induce vomiting' warning. Escalation is changed from conditional medical attention if symptoms develop or persist to unconditional emergency/hospital advice, reducing source faithfulness.
